info.title: igloo15.MarkdownApi.Tool
info.description: dotnet cli tool used to generate markdown documentation of the source

options.name: --namespace-filter
options.description:
(Default: ) A regex used to generate
documentation only for namespaces that match

options.name: --root-filename
options.description:
(Default: README.md) The name of the markdown
file at the root of your documentation

options.name: --title
options.description: (Default: Api) Title of the root home page

options.name: --summary
options.description:
(Default: ) A summary you want to appear on root
page

options.name: --namespace-page
options.description: (Default: false) Create pages for each namespace

options.name: --type-page
options.description: (Default: true) Create pages for each type

options.name: --constructor-page
options.description:
(Default: false) Create pages for each
constructor

options.name: --method-page
options.description: (Default: false) Create pages for each method

options.name: --property-page
options.description: (Default: false) Create pages for each property

options.name: --field-page
options.description: (Default: false) Create pages for each field

options.name: --event-page
options.description: (Default: false) Create pages for each event

options.name: --method-folder
options.description:
(Default: Methods) The folder to store method
pages in

options.name: --constructors-folder
options.description:
(Default: Constructors) The folder to store
constructor pages in

options.name: --property-folder
options.description:
(Default: Properties) The folder to store
property pages in

options.name: --field-folder
options.description: (Default: Fields) The folder to store field

options.name: --event-folder
options.description: (Default: Events) The folder to store event

options.name: --theme
options.description:
(Default: Default) The theme you wish to use.
Selecting a theme will potentially override the
commandline arguments you have defined

options.name: --default-theme-file
options.description:
(Default: default.settings.json) File containing
settings for the default theme

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

arguments.name: Dll Path
arguments.description: The path to the dll to create

arguments.name: Output Directory
arguments.description: (Default: md) The root folder to put
